caption: A man dressed in blue stands on a stage, holding a long pole vertically with both hands. He appears to be demonstrating or performing a martial arts technique, possibly involving the use of the pole as a weapon. The audience, seated at tables covered with red and white tablecloths, watches attentively. The setting is an indoor event space with warm lighting and a chandelier hanging from the ceiling. The man maintains a focused expression as he shifts his stance slightly, suggesting a deliberate and controlled movement. Another person, dressed in darker clothing, is partially visible behind him, possibly assisting or observing the demonstration. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal presentation or exhibition, likely related to martial arts or cultural performance.
